title: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
feature: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
scenario: Verify Device Home Screen displays Quick Settings based on user selection in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection, with varying counts (3, 2, 1, 0) reflecting saved selections.
steps: Go to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Verify that the Device Home Screen displays 3 quick settings.
Go back to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Verify that the Device Home Screen displays 2 quick settings.
Go back to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Verify that the Device Home Screen displays 1 quick setting.
Go back to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Deselect all options while keeping the toggle ON, then save.
Verify that the Device Home Screen displays no quick settings.
expected: The Device Home Screen displays quick settings based on the user's selection: 3 quick settings when 3 options are selected, 2 quick settings when 2 options are selected, 1 quick setting when 1 option is selected, and no quick settings when all options are deselected (toggle remains ON).
